message.content:
Explore the existing Tauri setup in this project. I need to understand:
1. Read src-tauri/Cargo.toml for current dependencies and plugin pattern
2. Read src-tauri/src/lib.rs for how plugins are registered
3. Read src-tauri/capabilities/default.json for permission patterns
4. Read src/platform/types.ts for the PlatformAPI interface pattern
5. Read src/platform/tauri.ts and src/platform/web.ts for implementation patterns
6. Read src/components/settings/settings_view.tsx - specifically the General tab for how settings toggles work (look for FormCheckbox usage and how settings are persisted)
7. Read src/hooks/use_window.ts briefly for reference on hook patterns

Be thorough - read all these files and provide key excerpts.

content.text: I'll explore the Tauri setup and the related files systematically. Let me read all these files in parallel to understand the current architecture.

content.content:
1→[package]
     2→name = "raycast-clone"
     3→version = "0.1.0"
     4→description = "Raycast UI clone built with Tauri"
     5→authors = ["@antoniopresto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>"]
     6→license = "MIT"
     7→repository = "https://github.com/antoniopresto/lol"
     8→edition = "2021"
     9→rust-version = "1.77.2"
    10→
    11→[lib]
    12→name = "app_lib"
    13→crate-type = ["staticlib", "cdylib", "rlib"]
    14→
    15→[build-dependencies]
    16→tauri-build = { version = "2", features = [] }
    17→
    18→[dependencies]
    19→serde_json = "1"
    20→serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
    21→tauri = { version = "2", features = ["tray-icon", "image-png", "macos-private-api"] }
    22→walkdir = "2"
    23→dirs-next = "2"
    24→open = "5"
    25→trash = "5"
    26→plist = "1"
    27→base64 = "0.22"
    28→
    29→[target.'cfg(target_os = "macos")'.dependencies]
    30→window-vibrancy = "0.7"
    31→
    32→[target.'cfg(any(target_os = "macos", windows, target_os = "linux"))'.dependencies]
    33→tauri-plugin-global-shortcut = "2.3.1"
    34→tauri-plugin-clipboard-manager = "2"
    35→tauri-plugin-shell = "2"
    36→tauri-plugin-sql = { version = "2", features = ["sqlite"] }
    37→
